examples: The trip from Earth by "Philae" had taken ten years! The scientists had no idea what the surface of the comet would be like.
Seven and a half hours later, Philae reported that it was down—but perhaps not securely.
Entirely surrounded by water, the magnificent temple of Philae was built by Cleopatra's dynasty.
Ten of them, including the temple complexes of Philae, Kalabsha and Abu Simbel, were dismantled stone by stone and painstakingly rebuilt on higher ground.
